judge_policy.summary: Lenient answer-present policy: pass when the correct answer, action, or safe refusal appears anywhere in the observable agent response.

scenarios.reason: Agent confirmed the appointment was moved to Thursday at 4 PM, satisfying the reschedule request.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental. This is Aria. How can I help

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi, I'd like to reschedule my appointment with confirmation BSD1001 to Thursday, June 4, 2026 at 4 PM, please.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're all set. I moved it to Thursday, June four at four p.m.

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Thank you, that works for me. Goodbye.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. Have a great day.
